summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blendlink iteration 22 features: Admin Panel pages (Genealogy, Orphans, Diamond Leaders, Themes, Analytics, AI Assistant), Wallet page with Daily Claim, Reactions API, and PKO Poker. All 22 backend tests passed. All admin pages load without 'body stream already read' errors. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection returns 403 Forbidden - real-time metrics unavailable in admin dashboard

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin-auth/secure/login/step1 - Returns token on valid admin credentials
Backend: POST /api/admin-auth/secure/login/step1 - Returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: GET /api/admin/orphans - Returns orphan list (33 orphans found)
Backend: GET /api/admin/orphans/stats - Returns orphan statistics
Backend: GET /api/admin/orphans/potential-parents - Returns potential parent users
Backend: GET /api/admin/diamond-leaders - Returns diamond leaders list
Backend: GET /api/admin/diamond-leaders/candidates - Returns diamond candidates
Backend: GET /api/admin/diamond-leaders/stats - Returns diamond statistics
Backend: POST /api/reactions/react - Reaction endpoint accessible
Backend: GET /api/reactions/item/{type}/{id} - Get item reactions works
Backend: GET /api/reactions/user/stats - User reaction stats accessible
Backend: GET /api/wallet/balance - Returns wallet balance
Backend: GET /api/wallet/transactions - Returns transaction history
Backend: POST /api/wallet/daily-claim - Daily claim endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/poker/tournaments - Lists available tournaments
Backend: GET /api/poker/lobby - Poker lobby accessible
Backend: GET /api/admin-system/dashboard - Admin dashboard loads
Backend: GET /api/admin/genealogy/tree - Genealogy tree loads
Backend: GET /api/admin/system/analytics - Analytics endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/themes - Themes endpoint works
Frontend: Admin login page renders correctly
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with stats (58 users, 3 posts, 5 listings, 1.3M BL coins)
Frontend: Admin Genealogy page loads without body stream errors
Frontend: Admin Orphans page shows 33 orphans with priority tiers
Frontend: Admin Diamond Leaders page shows qualification/maintenance requirements
Frontend: Admin Themes page shows 47 themes with management options
Frontend: Admin AI Assistant page loads with chat interface
Frontend: Admin Analytics page loads correctly
Frontend: User Wallet page shows balance (3,000 BL) with Daily Claim button
Frontend: Wallet has Team Commissions and Personal Sales tabs
Frontend: PKO Poker lobby loads with tournament rules and Create Table button
critical_code_review_comments: safeFetch pattern correctly implemented in admin components to prevent 'body stream already read' errors
Admin Orphans page shows 33 orphans with 11 priority tiers for assignment
Diamond Leaders page shows qualification (100 recruits, $1000 commissions, 6M BL) and maintenance requirements
Wallet page has dynamic Daily Claim button showing 2,000 BL reward
PKO Poker shows tournament rules: 10 players, 2000 chips, 20 min blinds, 1000 BL bounty per elimination
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1/P2 features tested and working: 1) Admin panel pages load without 'body stream' errors (safeFetch pattern applied), 2) Orphan Monitoring System shows 33 orphans with 11 priority tiers, 3) Diamond Leader Management shows qualification/maintenance requirements, 4) Wallet page has Daily Claim (2000 BL) and Team Commissions/Personal Sales tabs, 5) Binary Reaction System API endpoints working, 6) PKO Poker lobby accessible with tournament creation. WebSocket for real-time analytics returns 403 but doesn't block functionality.
